mapper.select: /* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontGroupsMapper.selectFrontGroupsList */ SELECT GROUP_SEQ /**/ , NAME /**/ , INVITE_CODE /**/ , USE_YN /**/ , REGISTER_SEQ /**/ , REGISTER_IP /**/ , REGISTRATION_DT /**/ , UPDATER_SEQ /**/ , UPDATER_IP /**/ , UPDATE_DT /**/ FROM TOPIC_GROUPS

/* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontGroupsMapper.selectFrontGroupsPage */ SELECT GROUP_SEQ /**/ , NAME /**/ , INVITE_CODE /**/ , USE_YN /**/ , REGISTER_SEQ /**/ , REGISTER_IP /**/ , REGISTRATION_DT /**/ , UPDATER_SEQ /**/ , UPDATER_IP /**/ , UPDATE_DT /**/ FROM TOPIC_GROUPS

/* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontGroupsMapper.selectFrontGroups */ SELECT GROUP_SEQ /**/ , NAME /**/ , INVITE_CODE /**/ , USE_YN /**/ , REGISTER_SEQ /**/ , REGISTER_IP /**/ , REGISTRATION_DT /**/ , UPDATER_SEQ /**/ , UPDATER_IP /**/ , UPDATE_DT /**/ FROM TOPIC_GROUPS WHERE GROUP_SEQ = #{groupSeq}
mapper.update: /* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontGroupsMapper.updateFrontGroups */ UPDATE TOPIC_GROUPS SET UPDATER_SEQ = #{updaterSeq} /*수정자_시퀀스*/ , UPDATER_IP = #{updaterIp} /*수정자_아이피*/ , UPDATE_DT = NOW(3) /*수정_일시*/ , NAME = #{name} /**/ , INVITE_CODE = #{inviteCode} /**/ WHERE GROUP_SEQ = #{groupSeq}

/* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontGroupsMapper.deleteFrontGroups */ UPDATE TOPIC_GROUPS SET UPDATER_SEQ = #{updaterSeq} /*수정자_시퀀스*/ , UPDATER_IP = #{updaterIp} /*수정자_아이피*/ , UPDATE_DT = NOW(3) /*수정_일시*/ , USE_YN = FALSE WHERE GROUP_SEQ = #{groupSeq}
